items.situation: two friends coordinating a weekend hiking or beach trip

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hey, are we still on for the Cascade ridge hike this Saturday? I've been checking the weather and it's looking pretty rainy.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yeah, I saw that too. Honestly, the trail gets really slick when it's wet, and the view at the top is the whole point. Want to push it to next weekend instead?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: That works for me. But maybe we just swap to the coastal walk this Saturday? It's covered most of the way and we don't waste the day.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Oh, that's a great call. The coastal route has those cafés near the lighthouse. We can grab lunch halfway.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Perfect. I'll text Sam too, so she can come if she wants. I'll meet you at the bus stop by nine.

questions.stem: What is the conversation mainly about?

options.A: How to change weekend plans because of bad hiking weather
options.B: Why the Cascade ridge trail closes during the autumn season
options.C: How the lighthouse café upgraded its lunch menu recently
options.D: Why Sam refused to join the coastal walk this Saturday

questions.explanation: 对话围绕因下雨更改原定登山计划展开，A 正确。B、C 凭空发挥；D 与对话中邀请 Sam 矛盾。

questions.stem: What will the speakers most likely do this Saturday?

options.A: Hike the Cascade ridge in the rain despite the conditions
options.B: Cancel all weekend plans and stay home in the dorms
options.C: Take the coastal walk and stop for lunch near the lighthouse
options.D: Drive to a different city to avoid the rainy weather entirely

questions.explanation: 对话最终敲定改走海岸路线并在灯塔附近吃午餐，故 C 对。A 与决定相反；B、D 与对话无依据。

items.situation: two students talking about which elective class to take next term

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I'm trying to pick an elective for next term and I can't decide. Have you taken any good ones?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Honestly, the film analysis seminar with Professor Cho was the best class I've taken. Tons of writing but really small group.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hmm. I was looking at that one. Is the workload actually heavy though? I've got organic chem next term.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: It's manageable if you stay on top of the weekly responses. The screenings happen Thursday evenings, so plan your lab nights around that.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh, that's a good warning. I'll check whether the Thursday evening lab block works first.

questions.stem: According to the man, what makes the film analysis seminar valuable?

options.A: It requires no writing assignments throughout the semester
options.B: It is taught by Professor Cho in a small group setting
options.C: It meets only twice a month for short discussions
options.D: It guarantees a high grade for all enrolled students

questions.explanation: 男生强调课程是 Professor Cho 教、小组小，故 B 对。A 与'tons of writing'相反；C、D 凭空发挥。

questions.stem: What will the woman likely do before enrolling?

options.A: Drop her planned organic chemistry course for next term
options.B: Wait until Professor Cho announces a different time slot
options.C: Speak with Professor Cho about reducing the workload
options.D: Check whether her Thursday evening lab schedule will work

questions.explanation: 女生在结尾明确说要先确认周四晚上的实验时间，故 D 对。A、B、C 都没有依据，且与她最后的发言不一致。

items.situation: two friends recommending a podcast or TV series to each other

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Have you finished that medical drama yet? The one with the rural clinic?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yeah, I burned through it last week. The first season is amazing, but I'd skip the second.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh really? What's wrong with the second?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: They added too many side characters and the pacing falls apart. If you want something better, try that podcast on long-haul truckers. It's only six episodes and totally absorbing.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hmm, a podcast is honestly easier with my study schedule. Send me the link?

questions.stem: Why does the man advise skipping the second season of the drama?

options.A: Its first episode was poorly written
options.B: Its rural clinic setting was abandoned
options.C: It added too many side characters and the pacing breaks down
options.D: It was canceled before the season finale aired

questions.explanation: 男生直接说'They added too many side characters and the pacing falls apart'，故 C 对。A、B、D 都未提及。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do after the conversation?

options.A: Watch the entire second season of the medical drama
options.B: Recommend the drama to her organic chemistry classmates
options.C: Listen to the long-haul trucker podcast in her free time
options.D: Send the man a link to a different podcast she likes

questions.explanation: 女生说播客更适合自己的日程并要链接，故 C 对。A 与男生建议相反；B、D 没有依据。

items.situation: a student returning a too-small sweater at a store counter

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hi, I bought this sweater here last week but it's a bit tight in the shoulders. Can I exchange it for a larger size?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Sure, do you have the receipt with you?

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I have the digital one on my phone. Does that work?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: That's fine. Let me see if we still carry that color in a medium. Hmm, looks like the cream is sold out, but we have it in dark green and navy.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh, the navy actually sounds better with what I wear. Let's go with that.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Great. I'll grab it from the back and we'll process the swap at the register.

questions.stem: Why is the woman returning the sweater?

options.A: Because the color faded after one wash
options.B: Because she lost the original paper receipt entirely
options.C: Because the cream color was discontinued by the brand
options.D: Because the sweater is too tight in the shoulders for her

questions.explanation: 女生明确说'a bit tight in the shoulders'，故 D 对。A、C 没有依据；B 与对话中她有电子收据相反。

questions.stem: What will most likely happen next?

options.A: The woman will leave with the same sweater unchanged
options.B: The man will refund her purchase entirely without exchange
options.C: The man will order the cream color from another store branch
options.D: The woman will receive a navy sweater after the swap at the register

questions.explanation: 对话结尾男生取一件海军蓝去收银台办理调换，故 D 对。A、B 与决定相反；C 凭空发挥。

items.situation: two students swapping music recommendations because one is bored of the same pop singers

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: I'm so bored of the same pop singers on my playlist. Any suggestions?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Honestly, you should try some indie folk. There's a Norwegian duo whose harmonies are unreal.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Hmm, folk isn't usually my thing. Is it the gentle acoustic kind?

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Not really. They use a lot of layered synthesizer textures under the vocals, so it's more atmospheric than acoustic. The latest album has been on repeat for me.

conversation.speaker: Woman
conversation.text: Oh, that sounds interesting actually. Synthesizers with folk vocals could break me out of the loop.

conversation.speaker: Man
conversation.text: Yeah, give it one full listen on the bus tomorrow.

questions.stem: What is the main point of the conversation?

options.A: The man is recommending atmospheric indie folk to the woman who is tired of pop
options.B: The woman is convincing the man to abandon his Norwegian duo entirely
options.C: The two friends are debating whether folk vocals should use synthesizers
options.D: The man wants the woman to stop using her commute for listening to music

questions.explanation: 男生向厌烦流行的女生推荐挪威组合的氛围民谣，A 概括最准确。B、C、D 与对话事实相反或凭空发挥。

questions.stem: What will the woman most likely do tomorrow?

options.A: Buy a vinyl copy of the album from a downtown store
options.B: Ask Sam for an alternative pop singer recommendation
options.C: Listen to the Norwegian duo's album during her bus ride
options.D: Take the man to a live concert by the same Norwegian duo

questions.explanation: 男生建议在公交上完整听一遍，女生表现出兴趣，故 C 对。A、B、D 都没有对话依据。
